## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style guide (ruff lint passes)
- [ ] Tests added for new functionality
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] No real beneficiary data added (all fixtures are simulated)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-facing change
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

## Test plan

How did you verify this change works as expected?

## Ethical check

If this PR touches beneficiary data handling, confirm:
- [ ] No PII is logged at INFO level
- [ ] No real beneficiary records were used
- [ ] Changes respect GDPR / HIPAA constraints
